clusters.title: The new logs test does not assert the command's observable behavior

member_findings.title: The new logs test does not assert the command's observable behavior
member_findings.impact: The only added test would still pass if `dscli logs` tailed the wrong path, ignored the requested line count, failed to print stdout, or stopped checking the worker address, because it mocks `subprocess.run` as successful and only asserts the return code.
member_findings.fix: Strengthen this test to assert the exact `subprocess.run` call, capture and assert printed stdout, and verify the worker-address path used for `127.0.0.1:31501`; add a negative case where `subprocess.run` returns nonzero and the command returns `BaseCommand.FAILURE`.
